title: Repair reviewed wait discipline and prove live native behavior
action: Repair only the independently reviewed delta. Change every writable doctrine/procedure surface to say that at least one material task-local action satisfies the progress interval; it does not require exhausting all local work. If completion arrives during the interval, handle its result exactly once before commentary, recompute the relevant live-agent set, and never call wait_agent when that set is empty. Preserve the one-list_agents fallback only when no material work remains, all D1 ownership protections, no authority/urgency exception, and the native-versus-external boundary. Replace whole-file scattered-keyword census logic with a localized normalized contract assertion plus order-sensitive and mutation cases that fail on wait-before-commentary, urgency/no-chatter exceptions, timeout-as-failure, interrupt/redispatch/ownership release, stale completion, zero-agent re-wait, and loss of external carve-out. Add one frozen material-work-remains scenario and clarify scenario 3's exhaustion precondition. Record an isolated root-AGENTS-only replay separately from the combined future-sync replay. Capture controlled native collaboration traces for an ordinary delegated gather and a swarm/review wave: force at least one empty timeout, perform the exact interval, handle completion once, stop at zero live agents, and preserve ownership. Record exact tool/result chronology without inventing output. Keep .agents read-only and do not touch worktree-isolation. Use the literal judge exactly as stored; run git diff --check and the configured full verify separately and never infer conjunction success.

truths: at least one material action satisfies the interval and does not require exhausting all local work
completion arriving during the interval is handled exactly once before commentary
relevant liveness is recomputed and zero live agents forbids another wait
localized order-sensitive and mutation assertions pin D1-D6 on every writable surface
root-only replay proves current Codex deployment independently of canonical procedure text
real native traces cover ordinary delegation and swarm/review flows
the stored literal judge actually exits zero with captured output
artifacts: ordinary-gather and swarm/review native trace evidence
updated doctrine spec and worker report
prohibitions: no rewrite of historical cell-2 trace
no .agents writes or false sync claim
no inferred pass from separately green constituents
